data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for incentive integration (complete survey for discount). However, the evidence provided does not include any details about how the survey completion leads to a discount, nor does it show any integration of incentives within the survey process. The linked use case mentions the need for incentive integration but does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of how survey completion leads to a discount.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define incentive integration process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that completing the survey triggers a discount for the customer.
